$comment: Audience profile — deep psychographic + behavioral context. Factual description of who they are.

_changelog.1.2: S26b: meta.product_fit removed (subjective — belongs in pilotage docs, not neutral receptacle). product_id = provenance only.
_changelog.1.1: S26 red-team patches: key_expressions[].sample_size added (frequency needs denominator). pain_points[].awareness_stage + benefits[].awareness_stage added. meta.scope/parent_slug/overlap_with added (audience hierarchy). meta.validation_status added (hypothesis→scaled lifecycle). Tag namespaces enforced (problem:/context:/profession:/awareness:/life_moment:/behavior:). Breaking: key_expressions was already object[] since S26-early.

_notes.scope: broad | segment | micro. Broad = persona large (ex: 'femmes actives'). Segment = poche définie (ex: 'infirmières debout'). Micro = hyper-niche (ex: 'infirmières urgentistes nuit'). Max 3 niveaux : broad → segment → micro. Pas de sous-micro.
_notes.parent_slug: Slug de la poche parente dont celle-ci est une déclinaison. Null si poche racine. Permet la navigation broad → narrow sans arborescence dossier.
_notes.overlap_with: Array de slugs d'autres poches qui partagent des traits. Signal de chevauchement — le détail de l'overlap (quels champs se recoupent) sort dans le rapport de mining, pas ici.
_notes.product_id: Primary product slug this audience is mapped to. Null = brand-level audience.
_notes.tags: Queryable labels with MANDATORY namespaces. Format: '{namespace}:{value}'. Namespaces autorisés : problem: | context: | profession: | awareness: | life_moment: | behavior:. Vocabulaire libre à l'intérieur du namespace. Ex: ['problem:foot-pain', 'context:standing-job', 'profession:nurse', 'awareness:solution-aware'].
_notes.audience_type: primary | secondary | discovered | assumed. 'discovered' = found via VoC mining (not anticipated). 'assumed' = inferred from product logic (not validated).
_notes.validation_status: hypothesis | tested | validated | scaled | fatigued. Factual observable state. hypothesis = pas encore testée en campagne. tested = ad set lancé, résultats non-concluants. validated = CPA/ROAS confirmé viable. scaled = budget significatif alloué. fatigued = performance en déclin. Règle : hypothesis > 30 jours sans test → flag par validate-resources.
_notes.product_id: Primary product slug this audience was discovered from / built for. Provenance only — multi-product mapping lives in pilotage docs, not here.

_notes.information_sources: Where they research before buying: Reddit, TikTok, Amazon reviews, friends, blogs, YouTube...

_notes.type: end_user | buyer | influencer | gatekeeper. If proxy purchase: set proxy_link_id to linked profile.
_notes.proxy_link_id: Audience slug of the linked profile (buyer ↔ user).

_notes.primary: What job do they hire this product for? One sentence.
_notes.context: When/where does this job become urgent?

_notes.core_desire: Deep motivational layer: status | power | belonging | safety | freedom
_notes.life_moments: Trigger events creating natural urgency (birth, move, promotion, breakup).
_notes.goals: What they want to achieve. Goals × benefits = communication core.

_notes.awareness_trigger: What event or signal makes them start looking for a solution?

_notes.channel_preferences: Where they discover and buy: social, search, email, marketplace, retail, referral

_notes.text: Exact verbatim in THEIR language. e.g. 'j'en ai marre de...'
_notes.platform: trustpilot | amazon | reddit | support | survey | page_copy | interview | google_reviews | instagram_dm | tiktok | youtube | facebook
_notes.frequency: Number of times this expression or close variants appear in the source. Null if not counted.
_notes.sample_size: Total corpus size for this source. frequency/sample_size = true weight. Required when frequency is set.

_notes.formulation: In THEIR vocabulary. Not the product-level formulation.
_notes.awareness_stage: unaware | problem_aware | solution_aware | product_aware | most_aware. At which awareness level this pain point resonates most. Factual — based on where in the funnel this language appears (TOFU reviews vs post-purchase).
_notes._source_meta.origin: voc | brand_declared | inferred. Tracks where this data point came from.
_notes._source_meta.platform: trustpilot | amazon | reddit | support | survey | page_copy | interview | google_reviews | instagram_dm | tiktok | youtube | facebook
_notes._source_meta.sample_size: How many data points support this pattern. Null if not counted.

_notes.awareness_stage: unaware | problem_aware | solution_aware | product_aware | most_aware. At which awareness level this benefit resonates most. Factual — based on where in the funnel this language appears.

_notes.type: prix | scepticisme | temps | confiance | urgence | efficacité | comparaison

market_position._notes: Override product-level sophistication if this audience diverges. Null = inherits.

_notes.confidence: 0-100. Based on volume and quality of sources.
_notes.sources_used: What data fed this profile: reviews, interviews, analytics, surveys...
